summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PWA implementation for Orbit360 Engine. All PWA files (manifest.json, sw.js, icons) are served correctly. All existing backend APIs and frontend pages continue to work without regression.
passed_tests: PWA manifest.json served at /manifest.json with correct name, dir:rtl, display:standalone
Service worker sw.js served correctly with caching logic
index.html has <link rel='manifest'> tag pointing to manifest.json
index.html has service worker registration script
Sidebar navigation works with all nav items
PWA install button hook implemented (shows only when beforeinstallprompt fires)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PWA implementation complete and tested. manifest.json, sw.js, and icons are all served correctly. The PWA install button in sidebar only appears when browser fires beforeinstallprompt event (requires mobile/Chrome PWA criteria). All 20+ backend API endpoints working. No authentication required for this app.
